fn has_active_users(users: &[User]) -> bool {
    // GOOD: use any() to short-circuit
    users.iter().any(|u| u.is_active)
}

fn count_admins(users: &[User]) -> usize {
    // GOOD: use count() directly on iterator
    users.iter().filter(|u| u.role == Role::Admin).count()
}

struct User {
    name: String,
    role: Role,
    is_active: bool,
}

enum Role {
    Admin,
    Member,
    Guest,
}
